title: ctenopteris insidiosa
intro: Ctenopteris insidiosa, also known as the 'Native fern', is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ctenopteris insidiosa include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Ctenopteris insidiosa are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
